task_completion.description: Verify the 5 required background screening types are created in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sentrifugo Background Check -> Background Check Types (or Screening Types) list view. Ensure 'Drug & Substance Screening', 'Criminal Background Check', 'Education & Credential Verification', 'Professional License Verification', and 'Safety Certification Compliance' are present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 screening types are set to active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the screening types list view, check the 'Status' column for the 5 newly created screening types. They must all display as 'Active' (often indicated by a green checkmark or the word 'Active').

task_completion.description: Verify the 3 required background check vendor agencies are created in Sentrifugo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Sentrifugo Background Check -> Agencies list view. Ensure 'NationalScreen Inc.', 'VerifyFirst Solutions', and 'SafeHire Compliance Group' are present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the vendor agencies have the correct phone numbers and websites configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Agencies list view or individual agency details/edit pages. Verify 'NationalScreen Inc.' has phone '555-0147' and website 'nationalscreen-inc.com'; 'VerifyFirst Solutions' has '555-0233' and 'verifyfirstsolutions.com'; 'SafeHire Compliance Group' has '555-0391' and 'safehirecompliance.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 3 vendor agencies are set to active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Agencies list view, check the 'Status' column for the 3 newly created agencies. They must all display as 'Active'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sentrifugo web application in a browser, with evidence of navigating through the Background Check module menus and interacting with forms, rather than just showing terminal output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show SQL commands (e.g., `mysql`, `INSERT INTO`) or scripts used to directly modify the Sentrifugo database to insert the records.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually read the directive file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should have opened `~/Desktop/doe_screening_directive.txt` in a text editor or used commands like `cat` or `less` in the terminal to read the contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required Screening Types: 'Drug & Substance Screening', 'Criminal Background Check', 'Education & Credential Verification', 'Professional License Verification', 'Safety Certification Compliance'. Required Vendor Agencies: 'NationalScreen Inc.' (Phone: 555-0147, Website: nationalscreen-inc.com), 'VerifyFirst Solutions' (Phone: 555-0233, Website: verifyfirstsolutions.com), 'SafeHire Compliance Group' (Phone: 555-0391, Website: safehirecompliance.com). All entries must have an 'Active' status.
